blended.narrative: Marble Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,114 ft. Looking ahead, 29 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
